name: Engage Pursuit MX
description: The Engage Pursuit MX features a proprietary ControlPro polymer core that delivers unmatched touch and feel for dinking and soft game strategies. The textured fiberglass face adds spin capability without sacrificing control, making it a favorite among players who prioritize finesse over raw power.
care_instructions: Wipe down with a damp cloth after each session. The textured face can collect debris — use a soft brush for deeper cleaning. Avoid exposing the paddle to temperatures above 120°F.
